name: 7 Layer Mexican Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the refried beans and taco seasoning together in a large bowl. If desired, mix in the jalapenos or other chilies.
2. Add the sour cream to the bean mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Spread the avocado mixture evenly over the top of the bean mixture.
4. Sprinkle the shredded cheese over the avocado layer.
5. Arrange diced tomatoes on top of the cheese.
6. Scatter chopped olives on top.
7. Place the assembled dip in a preheated oven set to low heat and bake until the cheese is melted, about 10-15 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and serve with chips. Enjoy!
